mechanism_narrative: Rising 3-month growth in real retail sales proxy RSAFS signals improving household demand and near-term revenue momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value 380869 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if walk-forward 20-day returns following positive 3-month RSAFS growth are not above unconditional returns, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE indicates labor-market deterioration that reduces income growth and raises recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE value 9.4 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below baseline at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation is accelerating and FEDFUNDS is rising, tighter monetary conditions increase discount rates and reduce equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.25 percentage points over 3 months and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds its 12-month rate
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS value 0.18 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if tightening-inflation triggers have nonnegative average 60-day returns or if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL acceleration and FEDFUNDS change has a positive coefficient in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 6-month momentum in INDPRO signals stronger production, operating leverage, and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO value 94.8756 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO momentum is followed by below-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations over rolling 5-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST signals weakening housing investment and reduced durable-goods demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% year over year
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST value 555.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if year-over-year HOUST declines greater than 10% are followed by positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of cases or if downside hit rate is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth combined with a falling UNRATE indicates broad labor-income expansion rather than statistical noise, supporting consumption and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS value 130712 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-falling signal does not outperform either single-series signal, or if its 20-day mean excess return is below zero in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Fast CPIAUCSL growth with no offsetting rise in FEDFUNDS signals falling real policy rates and inflation-pressure risk to margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 3% while FEDFUNDS changes by less than 0.10 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value 220.252 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: inflation scare with policy behind the curve
failure_condition: Reject if triggered 5-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 55% of cases or if CPIAUCSL acceleration conditional on flat FEDFUNDS has no negative return coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 growth paired with rising RSAFS indicates aggregate demand expansion that lifts expected earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth is positive and RSAFS rises over 3 consecutive months
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 value 13278.5 as of t-6mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and rising RSAFS condition fails to deliver above-median 60-day returns in at least 55% of triggered instances in walk-forward validation.
